title: Intelligento's Building Mods
description: The mods I use when creating builds in game for my animations and images
body:
This is my mod setup for inport mc worlds into mine-imator or blender.
The modpack is a builders modpack intended for the use of building eather alone or with other builders via a public lan ip.
the modpack contains varius tools and features that I use when building a set for my images/animations.
The modpack features include:
- Building tools for differnt skill levels.
- Build Paste for those who can't build. (Build library)
- Proximity voice chat and public lan ip adress for better multiplayer building.
- Music intergration (newer mc versions require spotify premium and are also untested)
- Custom cosmetics. (I use it to have my custom hat in game mostly cause I hate my skin without it)
- Performance mods and shaders. (Mainly for regual building, but I use shaders for other reasons)
- Free cam. (for getting a differnt angle at your build)
- A few world creation features. (So you don't accidently delete a world)
- gamma utils. (For building in dark places)

I reccomend configing the keybinds of this modpack before using (I use a 100% kayboard, plus it's allows for a better expirience with the modpack)

If you find any issues please report to the mod devs of the mods related to the issue. I can't fix any bugs in the modpack unless it's mod incompatibilities

Feel free to join the discord for mod seggestion for the modpack

Helpful links:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Tool used for importing worlds into blender:
- https://www.realtimerendering.com/erich/minecraft/public/mineways
- Mine-imator download (this link is used for any mc 1.20.2 release of this modpack):
- https://www.mineimator.com/download
- (continuation build mod link for newer mc releases of the modpack)
- https://www.mineimatorforums.com/index.php?/topic/91003-mine-imator-202-continuation-build-1010
- Model bench (modeling software made for mine-imator):
- https://www.mineimatorforums.com/index.php?/topic/79256-modelbench-115
- Blockbench (requires the mine-imator plugin to work with mine-imator and model bench):
- https://www.blockbench.net
- https://www.blockbench.net/plugins/mimodel_format

</details>
